# sphragis

> σφραγίς — post-quantum hybrid sealing (X-Wing KEM + ChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope)

Standalone fleet crate for multi-device content-key sealing. All cryptography
is behind the `preview-pq` feature (unaudited).

## Key files

- `src/lib.rs` — public API, `SEAL_VERSION_V1`, `WRAP_DOMAIN_V1`
- `src/hybrid.rs` — X-Wing KEM implementation
- `src/envelope.rs` — HKDF-SHA256 + ChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope
- `src/seal.rs` — `seal_for` / `unseal` multi-recipient API, `WrappedContentKey`
- `src/error.rs` — `SealError`
- `tests/known_answer_vectors.rs` — X-Wing KAT + RFC KATs + round-trip + negatives
- `DECISION.md` — full design rationale
- `Cargo.toml` — dependency versions (ml-kem 0.3.2, x25519-dalek 2.0.1, etc.)
